name: Trilinear forms with Kloosterman fractions
title: Trilinear forms with Kloosterman fractions
abstract: Provides bounds for trilinear forms with Kloosterman fractions, improving a Duke–Friedlander–Iwaniec result.
findings: Downloaded as the principal DFI-style comparison source. The remaining question is whether the H15 centered phase can be converted to this Kloosterman-fraction form without losing cancellation.
